=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (8:3-8:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D2] (14:3-14:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/simplePipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Simple pipe call with multiple arguments
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Simple pipeable style
export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/simplePipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Simple pipe call with multiple arguments
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Simple pipeable style
export const result2 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1),
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)
